scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c gray,blue,green "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/api start:dev" "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/web dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n shared,api,web,metro -c gray,blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/api start:dev" "pnpm --filter @ai-diary/web dev" "pnpm --dir apps/mobile start"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ai-diary/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-diary/api build && pnpm --filter @ai-diary/web build
